result.summary: Redis exposes a Redis command interface (used by client libraries and `redis-cli`) authenticated with Redis AUTH passwords or ACL username+password, plus operator-facing Redis Cloud and Redis Software REST APIs authenticated respectively by `x-api-key` + `x-api-secret-key` and HTTP Basic Auth, and Redis Enterprise for Kubernetes CRD APIs with auth not determined here.

redis_auth.label: Redis database AUTH credentials (password or ACL username+password)
redis_auth.setup: For a Redis database, use the server password configured with `requirepass`, or create an ACL user with a password using the Redis ACL system. See [AUTH](https://redis.io/docs/latest/commands/auth/index.html.md) and [ACL](https://redis.io/docs/latest/operate/oss_and_stack/management/security/acl/index.html.md). In managed/self-hosted deployments, these credentials are created by the database/cluster administrator for that Redis instance.

rc_account_key.label: Redis Cloud API user secret key
rc_account_key.setup: Sign in to [Redis Cloud](https://cloud.redis.io) as an account owner, open [Access Management → API Keys](https://redis.io/docs/latest/operate/rc/api/get-started/manage-api-keys/), and use **Add** to create a user key for an Owner, Viewer, Billing admin, or Logs viewer. Save the value when shown; the docs note this is the only time it can be copied. Send it as the `x-api-secret-key` header.

rs_basic_auth.label: Redis Software REST API username and password
rs_basic_auth.setup: Use a Redis Software cluster user account with permission to access the REST API. The docs state requests authenticate with HTTP Basic Auth using your username and password; the admin user has access to all endpoints by default. See [REST API](https://redis.io/docs/latest/operate/rs/references/rest-api/) and [Permissions](https://redis.io/docs/latest/operate/rs/references/rest-api/permissions/).

variables.name: host
variables.description: Redis server hostname or IP address

variables.name: cluster-host
variables.description: Hostname or IP of the Redis Software cluster
